title: Life Lately
excerpt: Around here we've been enjoying plenty of ordinary moments at home. Work has been really busy, though I am finally getting to the point where I am setting a schedule and doing my best to stick to it. Friends have…
body:
Around here we've been enjoying plenty of ordinary moments at home. Work has been really busy, though I am finally getting to the point where I am setting a schedule and doing my best to stick to it. Friends have come over for visits, we've been hanging out in the backyard a ton, and Jack is happily commando crawls around like crazy.

Since so much of our time is spent at home these days, I feel an itch to break out the big camera more so I can take (and share) more snapshots on a regular basis. And the plan is to not take photos of just Jack. Though he is still a willing subject and pretty darn cute.
